title: Principal Plant Manager at RINL South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at RINL South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, RINL South Asia Partners in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL South Asia Partners:
RINL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL South Asia Partners!
